titleStmt.title: SII 27.66: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 66. (A.R. No. 465 of 1928-29.) TIRUVAILU, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra of the Amṛitēśvara temple.

This record is dated Śaka 1312, Śukla, Mēsha 1, Monday. The given tithi corresponds to 1389 A.D., March 26 when the week-day was Friday, the Śaka year being current. If, however, the tithi is a mistake for 11, then the details regularly correspond with April 5 of that year.

It records a gift of land, after purchase from Baṅki Sāntaya and Kēśava-vappiri. To the temple of Amṛitanātha of Vomaṅjūru, for feeding twelve Brāhmaṇas including the cooks at the chhatra by Padumaladēvi daughter of Kāmadēvarasa of the Kadamba family, when Mallarasa was governing Maṅgaḷūru-rājya. It also states that the king made the land free from all taxes and endowed the village Moḷa for the maintenance of the same feeding house. It registers a further grant of a betel-nut garden by Padumaladēvi which was made over to Gōvinda and Nāraṇa of the Chaṭṭattila family who were to protect the gift hereditarily.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya naga
rāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1312 ne
ya śukla saṁvatsara mēśamāsa 1 neya sōmavāradaṁdu śrīmanmahā rājādhirāja
rāja paramēśvara śrī vīra harihara mahārāyara rājyābhyudayadalu malla
rsaru maṁgalūra rājyavanāḷuttiralli svastiśrī haradharaṇī prasūta mukkaṁṇa
kadaṁbavaṁśadalu śivacittaparāyaṇarappa kāmadēvarasara kumāri padumaladēvi
yaru tamage caturvvitha puruṣārtha sidhyarthavāgi vomaṁjūra Amrutanātha dēva
ra dēvālyadalu Ācaṁdrārka sthāyiyāgi māḍida dharma pratidinadalu Aḍige
ya māḍuvaranū saytavāgi 12 maṁdi brāṁhmaṇa bhōjanakke chatra naḍavaṁtāgi Omaṁ
jūra kutpāḍiyalu mārtaṁḍa dahanāda ḍāṁbaheggaḍe kayyara baḷiya baṁkisā
ṁtaya kēśavavappirige vastuva koṭṭu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi Avarakayiṁda koṁḍa kṣētrada
vivara Ā ḍāṁbaheggaḍeya kayyali koṁḍadu kutyaḍitiyaru bittuva bedekā
ru mū 6 Adaṟakeḷanapaḷḷi bittuva mū 3 ne Eṇṇu mediyaru bittuva mū 3 ne kuṁbakattimaru
bittuva mū 1 tāḷittimaru 2 kaṁ bittuva mū 4 jetrapāḍiya gade bittuva mū 3 A
daṟa mēlaṇa gade bittuva mū 3 toṭiṁda baḍagaṇa gadegaḷu bittuva mū 6 Aṁ
tu bittuva bedekāru mū 29 baṁki sāṁtana kayiṁda koṁḍadu maneyabāgi
lagade bittuva mūḍe 6 kuṇaṁbedaḷu gadde 3 kke bittuva mū 16 kuḍupinagade bi
ttuva mūḍe 3 Aṁtu bittuva mūḍe 25 vubhayaṁ bittuva bedekāru mū 54 Ada
kke haḍiya manebāvikere maraphala sahita Ā maneyiṁda baḍaga kutpala ba
ḷiya nere ṁga maṇiya kṣētradiṁda paḍuva dēvara ceyana maneyiṁda mūḍa kā
la haḷḷadiṁda teṁkaliṁtī catussīmeyoḷagāda kṣētravanū Ā dāṁba heggaḍe baṁkisā
ṁtaru padumala dēviyara kayiṁda kārāḷume mūlavakoṁḍarāgi taṁma taṁma
kārāḷmeya bhūmiyaṁda dāṁbaheggaḍe I chatrakke prativaruṣa 1 kke salikeya
hāneyali bhatta baḷa 30 lekkada mūḍe 183 Ā mariyādeyali baṁkisāṁ
ta naḍasuvaru bhattamū 183 vubhayaṁ bhatamūḍe 366 nū tappade naḍasabaharu
yī bhūmiyalu pūrvvatoḍa heccukuṁdillade varuṣaṁ prati Arasiṁge naḍadu
baha siddhāyada ga 20 hoṁnanū rāyara nirūpadiṁda kelagarasaru kuḷavakaṭisidarā
gi Omaṁjūravaru Ā bhūmige teṟasiddāyanaṭṭu beḍu biddubiya dukha Osage Āvu
dū yillade sarvvamāṁnyavāgi naḍasi baharu yi catrada mēluve cakke moḷa Eṁbavūranu rā
yaru varā 13 ṟa kuḷavakaḍiysi dhārāpūrvakavāgi koṭṭa saṁmaṁdha Ā vūru sarvamāṁnyavāgi
yīdhaṁmmakke salūvāgi Ā vūriṁda yeraḍu kaṁdāyadalu vupacāra jōḍi sahita
bahaga 90 nū naḍaysi sarvvamāṁnyavāgi bāḷuvaru Ā hoṁna veccada vivara dinaṁ
prati yī chatrakke tuppakuḍuke 2 kke tāra 5 tōyitā 2 śāka 5 kkaṁtāra 2 teṁginakāyi
8 jire tā 2 viḷeya bāḷele vuppu huḷi meṇasu saṁbāra kaṭagi yellavakke sahita
tāra 4 Aṁtupaṇa 2 ṟa lekkadali tiṁgaḷu 1 kaṁ yeḷuvare hoṁna mariyādiya
li variṣa 1 kaṁ ga 90 hoṁnū Ācaṁdrārkka sthāyiyāgi naḍavudu Ā moḷada vūra

ṁthā bhattamūḍe 24 nū
śivarā
brāṁhmaṇa
bhattavanū Ā
kārāḷmeya mūligaru koḍade voḷiysidaḍe taṁmakārāḷumeya
lā bahaṁthā bhattamū 24 nū Amrutanāthā dēvarige śivarātreya
pūjege dīvigege 1 hāḍayeṁṇege 3 hottana pūjage Āṟu ja
nada brāhmaṇa bhōjanake yaṁtiṣanū Ācaṁdrārkka sthāi yā
gi naḍasi sarvvamāṁnyavāgi bāḷuvaru yi chatrakke saluvaṁthābha
ttavanū Ā kārāḷmeya mūligarū koḍade vuḷisidaḍe taṁma kārāḷme
ya bhūmiyanū tāvāgi biṭṭavaru . mattuṁ padumaladēviyaru māḍida
dharṁmma Omaṁjūralu pelatiṭṭanalu taṁmakeyiṁda vastuvanikke tāvu
māḍisida Aḍakeya tōṭavanū mūvatteraḍu grāmakke paḍigi Akkige mē
lu veccakke sahita ga 7 dakṣiṇege ga 5 Aṁtāga 12 hoṁnanū Ācaṁdrārkka
sthāyiyāgi sarvvamāṁnyavamāḍsi brāṁhmariṁge bhōjanakke dakṣiṇegeṁdu Ā tō
ṭavanū dhāreyakoṭṭaru Ā dharṁmmastaḷada tōṭavaru Ā brāhmaṇaru caṭṭa
ttila gōyiṁdagevū nāraraṇaṁgevū Ārāvanu mūlavakoṭṭarāgi Ā caṭṭa
ttillavarugaḷu taṁma saṁtati saṁtati vuḷḷaṁna bara yīdharṁmmava naḍasi
bāḷuvaru yi dharṁmavanu pālisidavarige vāraṇāśiyalu sūriyagraha
ṇadalu sāvirakavileyanu sabrāṁhmarige koṭṭaphalavahudu 1000 brāṁ
hmariṁge Ācaṁdrārkka bhōjanavanu naḍasida phalavahudu . dāna pālanayō
ṁrmmadhyē dānāśrēyōnupālanaṁ dānāt svarggamavāpnōti pālanācyuta
ṁ padaṁ . sāmāṁnyōyaṁ dharṁmmasētuṁ nṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō
bhavadbhiḥ sarvāṁnētāṁ bhāvinaḥ pārthivēṁdrāṁ bhūyō bhūyō yāca
tē rāmacaṁdraḥ . yi dharṁmmakke Aḷupidavana tale Arasaṁge daṁḍavarāha
1200 Arasaḷupidanādaḍe vāraṇāśiyalu sāvirakavileyaṁ 1000
brāṁhmaraṁ koṁḍa dōṣakke hōhanu . sudattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō
harēcya vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimi . yēkayiva bhaginī lōkē dvitīyā na kadācana na grāhyā na karagra
stā vippradattā vasuṁdharā . yi dharṁmma śāsanavanū maṁgalūranāḷu
va malagarasaru baṁgaru cavuṭaru lājārada Aṟuvaru maṁgalūra
nakhara mitrāṭamaṁjaṁ noḍattavaru Omaṁjūra kayyaru dāṁ bahagga
ḍe modalāda kaṭṭaḷeyavaru yaṁtivarellara Anumatadiṁda baradu pratiṣṭisi
da śāsana yidharṁmavamāḍidavarige pālisidavarige maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
haradharaṇī prasūtana kaḷaṁka kadaṁbakulābdhi caṁdranurvvariyoḷu satyarā
yara śirōmaṇi kāmanrupālanātma varaguṇi padmalāṁbikeya dharṁmma
vidukṣitivuḷḷakāla doḷsthira naḍeyalnirīkṣisida pālisanīnamrutēśa śaṁbhuvē .
Digital edition of SII 27.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
